description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front features a landscaped garden with a swimming pool, surrounded by greenery and palm trees, creating a luxurious outdoor living space. The rear and sides of the bungalow are more private, with minimal windows and a focus on privacy. The building sits on a large, rectangular plot with a paved area extending around the house. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor connectivity, and a sleek, minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped garden featuring a swimming pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above and behind, highlighting the landscaped garden, swimming pool, and greenery on one side.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the bungalow with minimal windows and a clear view of the flat roof and paved surroundings.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side, emphasizing the pool area, lush landscaping, and the building's elongated shape.
description_view_3: View 3 is the front view, showcasing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the inviting garden and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
